title: Who you are (asked once, ever)
intro: Wide-range profile. Runs once in your life, writes ~/.claude/kit.profile.<user>.json. Every new project pre-fills from these answers — you can always override per project.

questions.question: What's your name? (used to label your global profile and as the default project owner)
What language should the kit and agents speak with you?

options.label: Mixed EN/ES
options.description: Switch freely between English and Spanish.

questions.question: Default strictness for NEW projects? draft = guardrails off (explore freely) · guided = warnings only · enforced = block (worktree-only, PR-per-issue).

options.label: Guided
options.description: Warnings, never blocks. Safe default — local-first.

options.label: Enforced
options.description: Blocks: worktree-only + PR-per-issue from the start.

questions.question: Default plan format for new projects?

options.label: Markdown
options.description: Plain markdown in plans/ — portable, zero build.

questions.question: Enable persistent memory (MemPalace) by default on new projects?

options.label: Off
options.description: No memory layer unless you turn it on per project.

options.label: On
options.description: Wire MemPalace + hooks on new projects.
